name: Maple Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add 1 cup of powdered sugar, beating well at a medium speed with an electric mixer.
3. Add the remaining powdered sugar and milk alternately, beating until the mixture is smooth enough to spread.
4. Stir in the maple extract until well combined.
Yield: about 1 cup.
